On.Send: AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant
AnimBracketStart Burrow Burrow IGNORE Unburrow ClosingFull,OpeningPlayForever,Instant

Remove.Send: AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce

On.Send: AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death OpeningPlayForever

On.Terms: Effect.InfernalFlamethrowerWoL@Damage.Start; At Target; ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType NotStructureTarget
Effect.InfernalFlamethrowerWoL@Damage.Start; At Target; ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType IsStructureTarget

Remove.Send: AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death ContentPlayOnce

On.Send: AnimBracketStart BSD Birth Stand Death OpeningPlayForever
AnimBracketStart Work Stand,Work,Start Stand,Work Stand,Work,End 0 1.750000 AsTimeScale

On.Terms: TimerExpired; TimerName Shadow; IsStatus ShadowCreate 1; !Option Model Low
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; !ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType NotStructureTarget
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; !ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType IsStructureTarget
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType NotStructureTarget
Effect.NapalmSpraySwarmBeta@Damage.Start; At Target; ValidateEffect InfernalPreIgniterSwarm@Upgraded; ValidateUnitType IsStructureTarget

On.Send: AnimBracketStart Morph Morph,Start Morph,Stand Morph,End Instant
AnimBracketStart Morph Morph,Start Morph,Stand Morph,End Instant
AnimBracketStart Phasing Work,Start Work Work,End Instant
AnimBracketStart Work Stand,Work,Start Stand,Work Stand,Work,End ClosingFull

On.Terms: AbilMorph.*.Finish; MorphTo Zergling; MorphFrom BanelingLotV1@Cocoon; !AbilKey BurrowUp
AbilMorph.*.Finish; MorphFrom Zergling; MorphTo BanelingLotV1@Cocoon; !AbilKey BurrowDown
